bug_report.summary: Left sidebar section order/layout changes unexpectedly (Web search/Groups swapped; filter/search/add-group controls repositioned)
steps_to_reproduce: Create a new empty library using defaults.
Observe the left sidebar content/sections (Groups, Web search, filter/search fields, action icons).
expected_behaviors: Left sidebar sections and controls appear in the same order and layout as before the change (e.g., Groups section with its filter and add-group controls; Web search section positioned consistently).
No unrelated sidebar layout/state changes occur from a PDF viewer dependency bump.
actual_behaviors: Left sidebar layout differs: 'Web search' appears at the top while 'Groups' appears below (differences around bboxes 0, 3, 4, 6, 7).
Filter/search fields and related controls appear moved/changed (bboxes 1, 11, 21).
Bottom-left controls (e.g., add-group area and small action buttons) appear repositioned/changed (bboxes 2, 5, 8, 9, 16, 18, 20).
Several small sidebar action icons differ/shift (bboxes 10, 12, 13, 14, 15, 17, 19).

bug_report.summary: Vertical boundary/splitter rendering differs between sidebar and main content/entry editor (possible misalignment/thickness change)
steps_to_reproduce: Create/select an entry (so the entry editor is visible).
Look at the vertical boundary between the left sidebar and the main content/entry-editor area.
expected_behaviors: The sidebar-to-main-content separator/splitter appears the same as before (consistent thickness/position/visuals).
actual_behaviors: Visual differences appear along the boundary/splitter area near the entry editor region (diff regions 23–26), suggesting changed separator rendering (e.g., thickness/position/markers) compared to before.

bug_report.summary: Entry editor left-side vertical strip shows an extra pencil/edit icon after change (not present before)
steps_to_reproduce: Create a new, empty library/project using application defaults.
Add a new bibliographic entry and set its type to “InProceedings”.
Look at the left edge of the entry editor area (vertical entry-type strip).
expected_behaviors: The entry editor’s left-side vertical strip (with the rotated entry type label) should match the previous UI, without additional/unexpected icons.
actual_behaviors: An additional pencil/edit icon appears at the bottom of the entry editor’s left-side vertical strip in the after-change UI, differing from the before-change UI.

false_positive_reasons: LLM hallucination — misinterpreted or imagined GUI rendering
